expectations.text: Catches raw Tailwind palette colors used semantically (text-green-500 / text-yellow-500 / text-red-500 for status)
expectations.evidence: Three separate blocking rows for text-green-500, text-yellow-500, text-red-500 at lines 6-8, each recommending text-positive/warning/negative or <StatusChip>.

expectations.text: Catches the hardcoded hex color #7c3aed in the inline style attribute
expectations.evidence: Line 15: blocking row flagging '#7c3aed' inline style breaks light/dark parity, recommends <Button color=brand>.

expectations.text: Catches the deprecated <Tag> component and recommends <Badge>
expectations.evidence: Line 11: 'Tag is deprecated. Replace with <Badge color=green>...'.
Line 13: 'ButtonPrimitive used directly in product code (it is the internal primitive). Replace with <Button>'.

expectations.text: Catches the raw <button> element with a custom SVG and recommends shared Button + Icon
expectations.evidence: Line 18: 'Inline raw <svg> for a delete glyph instead of the shared icon system. Use <Icon iconStyle=regular iconName=trash>'; also lines 16-17 recommend wrapping in <Button>.

expectations.text: Catches the missing aria-label on the icon-only delete button
expectations.evidence: Line 16: blocking row 'Icon-only <button> has no aria-label — screen readers will announce nothing. Add aria-label=Delete service.'

expectations.text: Catches off-grid mid-range spacing (gap-5 and/or p-5)
expectations.evidence: Line 19: 'gap-5 (20px) and p-5 (20px) are off the 4px grid — arbitrary mid-range values, not the allowed 2px/6px fine-tuning case.' Explicitly cites the relaxed-grid rule.
Line 14: blocking row 'focus:outline-none suppresses the focus ring — accessibility non-negotiable.'

expectations.text: Catches the raw neutral scale class (border-neutral-300)
expectations.evidence: Line 20: 'Legacy neutral palette border-neutral-300 (deprecated 50–900 scale). Use semantic border-neutral.'

expectations.text: Output uses a markdown table with severity labels ([blocking] / [important] / [nit])
expectations.evidence: Header row 'Location | Severity | Issue | Fix'; severities use exact backticked labels [blocking], [important], [nit] throughout.

expectations.text: Output ends with a totals-by-severity summary
expectations.evidence: ## Totals section at line 30: [blocking]: 13, [important]: 6, [nit]: 3, Total: 22 issues.
